data.name: OUR LUST SHELTER
data.detailed_description:
OUR LUST SHELTER is a visual novel in a post-apocalyptic world.

You find an abandoned base and begin transforming it into a safe haven amid the ruins of a lost world. Explore locations, have sex, and defend yourself from the dangerous zombies who make life difficult.

During your forays, you meet female survivors. Communication, choices, and decisions lead to the development of relationships. Experience all the stages, from trust and flirtation to outright intimacy. Each character has their own personality and storyline.

In the game you'll find:

  • Beautiful girls

  • Deep storyline

  • Atmospheric music

  • Intimate scenes

Rebuild your life from scratch, surround yourself with beautiful women, and enjoy sex in a post-apocalyptic world where pleasure is the best reward for survival!

data.short_description: OUR LUST SHELTER is a visual novel for adults in a post-apocalyptic world. Protect your base from zombies, explore new territories, and build relationships with sexy girls who wouldn't mind having sex with you.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or new
  • 處理器: Intel core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GTX 1060
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or new
  • 處理器: Intel core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GTX 1650
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 11 or new
  • Processor: Intel core i3
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GTX 1060
  • Storage: 8 GB available space
